caisse.title: Cash desk
caisse.subtitle: Fast checkout by scan, cart entry, split payment and ticket after-sales tracking.

accessDenied.title: Limited access
accessDenied.text: Your profile is not allowed to use the cash desk yet.

saleContext.title: Sale context
saleContext.subtitle: Select the shop, tenant and travel references.

placeholders.ticketComment: Useful information to keep on the sale
placeholders.scanCode: Scan a barcode or enter a manual code
placeholders.searchProduct: Search for a product by code, designation or family
placeholders.searchHistory: Search by ticket, shop, tenant or seller

scan.title: Priority scan
scan.subtitle: Scan a code or add an item through search if needed.
scan.unknownComment: Unrecognized scan from the cash desk

empty.noProductMatch: No active product matches the current search.
empty.noProductConfiguredTitle: No product configured for this shop
empty.noProductConfigured: This shop has no active product and no stock supplied yet. Ask the shop manager to create products and supply stock before checkout can be used.
empty.noGeneratedTicket: No ticket generated in this session yet.
empty.noSelectedSaleText: Choose a ticket in the history to display its details and run after-sales actions.
empty.noTicketText: Run a reprint to regenerate the ticket for this sale.

recentSales.title: Latest sales
recentSales.subtitle: Quick view of recent tickets in the application.

currentTicket.title: Current ticket
currentTicket.subtitle: Current sale cart with quantities and instant totals.
currentTicket.emptyText: Scan a product or add it from search to start the sale.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Split the settlement across one or more payment modes.

generatedTicket.title: Last generated ticket
generatedTicket.subtitle: Text preview of the cash ticket just issued.

history.title: History, returns and cancellations
history.subtitle: Select a sale to view details, reprint the ticket or process after-sales service.
history.sellerSubtitle: Review recent sales for your shop and ticket details.

linesPayments.title: Lines and payments
linesPayments.subtitle: Detailed summary of items and settlement.

corrections.title: Registered corrections
corrections.subtitle: History of returns, cancellations and adjustments.

ticketPreview.title: Ticket preview
ticketPreview.subtitle: Most recent version of this ticket.

validation.title: Ticket validation
validation.subtitle: Quick check before final sale registration.
validation.warning: This action creates the sale, its lines, payments and ticket. Any later correction must go through a traced operation.

operation.warning: The sale status and its payments will be updated. The action will appear in the correction history.

messages.accountWithoutId: The connected account does not expose a usable user identifier. The ticket cannot be validated until this is corrected.
messages.contextLoadError: Could not load the shop context. Try again or contact an administrator.
messages.productAdded: {{product}} has been added to the ticket.
messages.productOutOfStock: {{product}} has no stock available in this shop.
messages.ticketIncomplete: The ticket cannot be validated until required information and payment are complete.
messages.saleValidated: Sale {{ticket}} has been registered and the cash ticket has been generated.
messages.partialSaleError: Sale {{ticket}} was partially created, but a ticket or payment step failed. Check the data before resuming.
messages.finalizeError: The sale could not be finalized. Check the entered data and try again.
messages.insufficientStock: Insufficient stock to validate this sale. Adjust the cart and try again.
messages.paymentMismatch: The payment total must match the net total.
messages.inactiveTenant: The selected tenant does not actively operate this shop.
messages.noActiveTenantForShop: No active tenant operates this shop. The sale cannot be validated.
messages.completeBeforeValidate: Complete the sale context, cart and payments before validating the ticket.
messages.selectSaleForPreview: Select a sale to display the ticket large.
messages.selectSaleBeforeAction: Select a sale before launching this action.
messages.saleCannotBeCancelled: This sale can no longer be cancelled.
messages.onlyValidatedCanReturn: Only validated sales can be returned.
messages.reasonRequired: A reason is required to trace this operation.
messages.selectSaleBeforeReprint: Select a sale before launching a reprint.
messages.ticketReprinted: The ticket has been regenerated and the reprint has been registered.
messages.ticketPrinted: The ticket print window is open.
messages.printError: Could not open the print window. Check the pop-up blocker.
messages.selectTicketBeforePrint: No ticket is available to print.
messages.saleCancelled: The sale has been cancelled successfully.
messages.saleReturned: The sale return has been registered.
messages.operationError: The operation could not be finalized.
messages.multipleBarcodeMatches: Several products match this code for the current selection. Manually choose the right item.
messages.multipleProductMatches: The search returns several products. Select the one to add to the cart.
messages.unknownScanSaved: Code {{code}} was not recognized. An unknown scan was saved; contact an authorized manager.
messages.unknownScanAssignable: Code {{code}} was not recognized. You can now assign it to a product.
